title: Mnemosyne Tool Catalog
description: JSON shape accepted by `mnemosyne transform --tools-file` and by the bundled per-harness tool catalogs under internal/serialize/toolcatalog/. Each entry describes one callable tool; both the OpenAI-wrapped form (`{type: "function", function: {...}}`) and the flat form (`{name, description, parameters}`) are accepted.

wrappedTool.description: OpenAI-style wrapper: the tool metadata sits under `function`.

type.description: Tool kind. Defaults to "function" when omitted.

name.description: Unique tool identifier. Matches the name emitted in assistant tool_calls.

description.description: One-line description of the tool's behaviour.

flatTool.description: Flat shape: name/description/parameters live at the top level of the entry.

type.description: Tool kind. Defaults to "function" when omitted.

name.description: Unique tool identifier. Matches the name emitted in assistant tool_calls.

description.description: One-line description of the tool's behaviour.

parameters.description: JSON-Schema describing the tool's input arguments. Typically `{type: "object", properties: {...}, required: [...]}`.

type.description: Top-level parameters are conventionally a JSON object.

schemaObject.description: A JSON-Schema fragment. Left open so catalog authors can use any draft-2020-12 keywords (enum, items, oneOf, etc.).
